description_long: This is a compact, rectangular vending kiosk with a smooth, white exterior and a rounded top. The front features a transparent window displaying several blue spherical capsules inside, suggesting it is a capsule toy or gashapon machine. Below the window is a circular dispensing mechanism with a blue ring, a coin slot, and a small retrieval opening. The sides are plain, with the right side showing the transparent window wrapping slightly around the corner. The top is arched, giving the kiosk a modern, streamlined appearance. A printed sign with Japanese text and graphics is mounted above the dispensing area, adding a playful and commercial touch.
description: A white, capsule toy vending kiosk with a rounded top, transparent front window, and a blue-accented dispensing mechanism. Features a printed sign and visible blue capsules inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the transparent window with blue capsules, printed sign, coin slot, and dispensing mechanism.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the curved top, transparent window wrapping around, and the stacked blue capsules inside.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, solid white back and the arched roof with no visible features.
description_view_3: Left-side view with the transparent window and blue capsules visible, but no dispensing mechanism or signage.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign above dispensing area with Japanese text and graphics
attribute_window_presence: one large, curved rectangular window on the front and partially on the sides
attribute_door_configuration: one small retrieval door below the dispensing mechanism on the front
attribute_roof_design: arched, smooth, white plastic roof with no overhangs or decorative elements
